Aspar..Extremities, coldness: There is coldness of the, extremities and also some itching of the skin, but the head symptoms are predominant.
Aspar..Mind, restlessness, nervousness: This patient is disturbed by everything, worse after eating even a moderate meal.
Aspar..Skin: The skin is sensitive to touch.
Aspar..Stomach, pain, gnawing: When there is gnawing in the stomach after eating, or when the child has taken all it can hold yet cries for the bottle, or empties its stomach by spitting up and vomiting the food and then reaches out whining and crying for more, think of Cina.
Aspar..Mind, night: The child takes a moderate supper and dreams all night, jerks and twitches in sleep, rouses up in a fright, talks excitedly about what he has dreamed, thinks it is real, and sees dogs, phantoms, and frightful things lie has dreamed about.
Aspar..Sleep, sleeplessness: Child cannot sleep unless on the belly or in constant motion.
Aspar..Stomach, heaviness, eating, after: The child or adult is not relieved by eating, is still hungry. The stomach is loaded and yet he is hungry.
Aspar..Stomach, heaviness, weight, oppression: The stomach is loaded and yet he is hungry.
Aspar..Stool: The Cina stool is not very copious, and often white.
Aspar..Generalities, heat: The complaints are aggravated in summer; the heat affects the brain, arrests his functions, and on comes diarrhoea with green, slimy stools or white stools, and the child vomits.
Aspar..Stomach, heaviness: The stomach is loaded and yet he is hungry.
Aspar..Stomach, heaviness, eating: The child or adult is not relieved by eating, is still hungry. The stomach is loaded and yet he is hungry.
Aspar..Extremities, coldness, foot: the head is hot and the feet are cold in the sun.
Aspar..Eye, brilliant: glassy eyes, drawn mouth and white ring around the nose and mouth.
Aspar..Clinical, cyanosis: Blue ring or gray streak around the mouth.
Aspar..Mind, fear: Screams and trembles, with much anxiety on waking; whines and complains.
